backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three Holi-themed features (greeting banner, color accents, date-gating utility) with their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH color tokens and CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections and conditionally renders HoliGreeting and HoliColorAccents components (date-gated to March 3, 2026) above the main content.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Scroll-animated section for the Assured Tours & Travels division displaying a banner, image pair, service cards, and a time-limited 'New' badge on the Passport Services card with WhatsApp CTA integration.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) as animated cards with 'Launching Soon' badges and WhatsApp notify buttons.
frontend/src/components/DiscountCountdow: A countdown timer component that displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until a discount deadline, with gold-themed styled unit boxes and corner accents.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer for Luminia Group displaying the logo, portfolio brand list, and contact links (email and WhatsApp) with a gold-on-dark luxury aesthetic.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, Luminia Group logo, tagline, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the subsidiaries section, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/HoliColorAccents: Renders fixed, animated colorful blurred blob overlays and a bottom image strip as ambient Holi festival decorations, only when today is Holi.
frontend/src/components/HoliGreeting.tsx: A full-screen Holi greeting modal with animated color blobs and particles that auto-dismisses after 5 seconds and stores dismissal state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Section page for the Luminia Captures photography division, displaying a service grid, banner and gallery images, and a WhatsApp booking CTA with scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Renders the Luminia TechLabs section showcasing tech services (web, mobile, AI, etc.) and government document assistance services (Voter ID, Aadhaar, certificates), with scroll animations and WhatsApp CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a centered manifesto quote section for Luminia Group with a gold-themed design, scroll-triggered fade-in animation, and a stats row showing subsidiaries, ambition, and vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to page sections, a logo that scrolls to top, scroll-aware background styling, and a responsive hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSection.t: Two-step payment section that first shows a 'Proceed to Pay' prompt, then reveals a UPI/Google Pay QR code, and sends a WhatsApp payment confirmation with a generated UTE reference number.
A full-screen 'Coming Soon' placeholder page with the Luminia Group logo, gold decorative elements, a fade-in animation, and a footer copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal component that displays detailed information about a subsidiary, including an image carousel with keyboard navigation, description, and a WhatsApp enquiry button.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Renders a grid of all seven Luminia subsidiary cards with icons, taglines, and enquiry buttons, and opens a SubsidiaryDetails modal when a card is clicked.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash screen shown once per session, featuring animated falling particles, a pulsing logo, and an 'Enter' button that fades the popup out.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: A hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Cormorant Garamond font, defines CSS custom properties for the gold/obsidian design system, and declares all keyframe animations used across the site.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Exports a single utility function isHoliToday that returns true only when the current date is March 3, 2026 (Holi day).
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Defines utility functions for opening WhatsApp with pre-built message templates for bookings, brand notifications, government services, and payment confirmations using a fixed WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury dark theme with custom gold, obsidian, and ivory color palettes, serif typography, zero border-radius defaults, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Luminia Group site tracking existing features (Holi-themed banner, color accents, date-gating utility) and a pending feature request for a Holi-themed design active only on March 14, 2025.
